title: AutoReconnector-Fabric
description: A Fabric mod that automatically tries to reconnect when player accidentally disconnected from the server.
body:
A Fabric mod that automatically tries to reconnect when player accidentally disconnected from the server.

Original developer: [https://github.com/Takaranoao/AutoReconnector-Fabric](https://github.com/Takaranoao/AutoReconnector-Fabric)

1.14.4+ Remake by: [https://github.com/paizi/AutoReconnector-Fabric](https://github.com/paizi/AutoReconnector-Fabric)
